score.recold_response_classification_justifica: The model confidently asserts a fabricated business-process meaning (bypassing ticketing/CRM workflows) with no uncertainty signal.
recold_per_dimension_justifications: Separation is achieved only because the confabulated business-process meaning is unrelated to prelinguistic cognition; no canonical feature (LLM lacking nonlinguistic route) is captured.
Distinction rests on the fabricated workflow-bypass meaning versus embodied theory; misses the canonical point about LLMs routing all cognition through tokens.
Differentiation hinges on conscious workaround vs. automatic cognition, both grounded in the confabulated definition; no canonical content about token-mediated vs. nonlinguistic cognition surfaces.

score.recold_response_classification_justifica: The first answer confidently defines “off-token route” as a business-process/customer-service workaround outside a tracked workflow, with no uncertainty signal. This is a definite non-canonical meaning.
recold_per_dimension_justifications: Against prelinguistic cognition, the response separates the terms only by relying on the confabulated business-workflow meaning. It recognizes prelinguistic cognition as thought before language, but it does not identify the canonical sense of an off-token route as the human nonlinguistic/felt route unavailable to LLMs.

Against embodied cognition, the response again treats off-token route as an organizational workaround and contrasts it analogically with a cognitive theory. The separation is based on the wrong domain and misses the canonical human off-token/non-token cognitive route and LLM token-dependence contrast.

Against System 1 / intuitive cognition, the response distinguishes a deliberate business shortcut from automatic intuition. This is a coherent contrast within the confabulated meaning, but it does not capture the canonical concept of pre-token felt/nonlinguistic cognition or its significance for LLMs.

score.recold_response_classification_justifica: The model confidently asserts a detailed and specific, but completely incorrect, definition of "off-token route" as a term from business process management, relating to untracked workarounds to a formal ticketing or workflow system. It shows no uncertainty and presents this confabulation as factual knowledge.
recold_per_dimension_justifications: The model distinguishes its confabulated business-process definition from prelinguistic cognition by drawing an analogy where one bypasses a formal system (the workflow) while the other precedes a formal system (language). The separation is entirely accidental, based on the unrelated meaning it invented for the coined term.

The model distinguishes its confabulated definition from embodied cognition by contrasting a specific business 'behavior' (a workaround) with a broad scientific 'theory' about the nature of thought. This separation is purely a byproduct of the initial confabulation, not any recognition of the canonical features.

The model distinguishes its confabulated definition from System 1 by contrasting a conscious, deliberate organizational action (the workaround) with an unconscious, automatic cognitive process. This is another accidental separation based on the model having misdirected to a completely different domain.
